label: gemini-3-pro-image
descriptiveGuide: A 15-minute core circuit: 30-second plank, 15 dead bugs per side, and 15 bird-dogs per side. Repeat 3 rounds with 30 seconds rest between exercises. Keep your lower back pressed into the floor during dead bugs.
prompt: Generate an educational illustration for Core exercises with focus on "A 15-minute core circuit: 30-second plank, 15 dead bugs per side, and 15 bird-dogs per side. Repeat 3 rounds with 30 seconds rest between exercises. Keep your lower back pressed into the floor during dead bugs."
